posts.author: Torje (Torje S. Tønnesen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello.

Need some help setting up a formula.

I want to track a percentage of project degree of completion.

This will be based on subitems from two groups, representing and payment or invoice. When status is complete for invoice these numbers should help track project completion, in percentage, based on invoice sent (or set to status complete), and divided by total budget.

Also, is it possible to insert a formula on a dashboard? Really only here the information would be valuable, and having the formula column on the board is only in the way.
